image:image.image:title: Nextel Connect — Your World, Your Network
image:image.image:caption: Nextel Connect brand emblem on a dark green and gold abstract background.

image:image.image:title: What Nextel Is
image:image.image:caption: Nextel is a regulated, NCC-compliant virtual telecom service provider.

image:image.image:title: Nextel CAC Certificate of Registration
image:image.image:caption: Nextel Network CAC Certificate of Registration, Business Name No. 9628017.

image:image.image:title: How Does Nextel Generate Revenue
image:image.image:caption: Six revenue streams that fund Nextel subscriber rewards.

image:image.image:title: Nextel eSIM Categories — Diamond and Royal Pricing
image:image.image:caption: Official pricing breakdown for Nextel Diamond eSIM and Royal eSIM.

image:image.image:title: Free Calls, Airtime and Data with Nextel eSIM
image:image.image:caption: Earn every day, make free calls, and enjoy free airtime and data with a Nextel eSIM.

image:image.image:title: Nextel V-Card — Earn From Calls, Spend Anywhere
image:image.image:caption: Nextel V-Card powered by Verve lets you spend your call earnings anywhere in the world.

image:image.image:title: Nextel My Website Dashboard
image:image.image:caption: Ads Center and audience reach analytics on a Nextel personal website page.

image:image.image:title: Your Website, Your Revenue, Everyday
image:image.image:caption: Turn your personal Nextel page into a daily income machine with Google ads.

image:image.image:title: Nextel Incentives and Achievement Rewards
image:image.image:caption: Hitting a referral target earns massive bonuses, gadgets, and trips.

image:image.image:title: Nextel Partners — MTN, Glo, Airtel
image:image.image:caption: Nextel's legally binding partnerships with MTN, Glo, Airtel, 9Mobile, StarTimes, DStv, GOtv and PHCN.

image:image.image:title: Nextel Cloud Dashboard
image:image.image:caption: Track total earnings, virtual line status, and phonebook call rewards in Nextel Cloud.

image:image.image:title: Free Nextel POS Terminal
image:image.image:caption: Verified Nextel subscribers qualify for a free POS terminal to operate a business.

image:image.image:title: Nextel eSIM Product Shot
image:image.image:caption: Nextel eSIM card, your world, your network.
